requirement_topic.en: Hazardous substance restriction — no EU-style horizontal RoHS regime in Nepal vs China GB/T 26572
requirement_topic.zh: 有害物质限制——尼泊尔无欧盟式横向 RoHS 制度 vs 中国 GB/T 26572
requirement_topic.zht: 有害物質限制——尼泊爾無歐盟式橫向 RoHS 制度 vs 中國 GB/T 26572

summary.en: Nepal does not operate an EU-style horizontal RoHS regime restricting heavy metals and brominated flame retardants in electrical and electronic equipment as a mandatory market-access condition. As of 2026 there is no Nepal equivalent to the EU RoHS Directive 2011/65/EU restricting the 10 substances across all EEE, and no national mandatory substance-restriction certificate that an LED luminaire must hold to enter the Nepali market on substance grounds. This is stated plainly: the absence of a horizontal RoHS regime is not the same as a permission to use restricted substances freely — chemical-management obligations exist in Nepal through general environmental, hazardous-substance, and import controls, and through buyer / tender requirements — but there is no single binding RoHS substance-restriction gate equivalent to the EU. Exporters should confirm any substance-related import or procurement conditions with the in-country importer.
summary.zh: 尼泊尔不运行欧盟式横向 RoHS 制度，即不将限制电气电子设备中重金属和溴化阻燃剂作为强制市场准入条件。截至 2026 年，尼泊尔不存在等同于欧盟 RoHS 指令 2011/65/EU 的、在所有 EEE 中限制 10 项物质的制度，也没有 LED 灯具须基于物质理由持有才能进入尼泊尔市场的国家强制物质限制证书。明确说明：缺乏横向 RoHS 制度并不等同于可自由使用受限物质——尼泊尔通过一般环境、危险物质和进口管制，以及通过买家/招标要求存在化学品管理义务——但不存在等同于欧盟的单一具约束力 RoHS 物质限制门槛。出口商应与在地进口商确认任何与物质相关的进口或采购条件。
summary.zht: 尼泊爾不運行歐盟式橫向 RoHS 制度，即不將限制電氣電子設備中重金屬和溴化阻燃劑作為強制市場准入條件。截至 2026 年，尼泊爾不存在等同於歐盟 RoHS 指令 2011/65/EU 的、在所有 EEE 中限制 10 項物質的制度，也沒有 LED 燈具須基於物質理由持有才能進入尼泊爾市場的國家強制物質限制證書。明確說明：缺乏橫向 RoHS 制度並不等同於可自由使用受限物質——尼泊爾通過一般環境、危險物質和進口管制，以及通過買家/招標要求存在化學品管理義務——但不存在等同於歐盟的單一具約束力 RoHS 物質限制門檻。出口商應與在地進口商確認任何與物質相關的進口或採購條件。

standards_or_laws: No EU-style horizontal RoHS regime in Nepal as of 2026 — no national mandatory 10-substance restriction equivalent to Directive 2011/65/EU
General Nepal environmental / hazardous-substance and import controls, plus buyer / tender substance requirements where invoked

summary.en: China operates GB/T 26572 (Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in electrical and electronic products), covering the original 6 RoHS substances (Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr(VI), PBB, PBDE) at the same concentration thresholds as EU RoHS, and China RoHS 2 (SJ/T 11364) requires a hazardous-substance disclosure label (orange / green marking) on EEE sold in China. China thus has a defined substance-restriction-and-disclosure framework, although as of 2026 the 4 EU phthalates (DEHP, BBP, DBP, DIBP) are not yet in the China mandatory restricted list.
summary.zh: 中国运行 GB/T 26572（电子电气产品中限用物质的限量要求），涵盖原 6 项 RoHS 物质（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE），浓度限值与欧盟 RoHS 相同；中国 RoHS 2（SJ/T 11364）要求在中国销售的 EEE 上贴附有害物质披露标识（橙色/绿色标识）。因此中国设有界定明确的物质限制与披露框架，尽管截至 2026 年欧盟 4 项邻苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP）尚未纳入中国强制限制清单。
summary.zht: 中國運行 GB/T 26572（電子電氣產品中限用物質的限量要求），涵蓋原 6 項 RoHS 物質（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE），濃度限值與歐盟 RoHS 相同；中國 RoHS 2（SJ/T 11364）要求在中國銷售的 EEE 上貼附有害物質披露標識（橙色/綠色標識）。因此中國設有界定明確的物質限制與披露框架，盡管截至 2026 年歐盟 4 項鄰苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP）尚未納入中國強制限制清單。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 26572 — Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in EEE (China — original 6 substances)
SJ/T 11364 — China RoHS 2 hazardous-substance disclosure marking

gap.en: Here Nepal is the less demanding side on substance restriction: China has a defined RoHS framework (GB/T 26572 restriction of the 6 substances plus the China RoHS 2 disclosure label), whereas Nepal has no horizontal RoHS regime acting as a market-access gate. Consequently a product built to China RoHS is generally already at or above any baseline Nepal substance expectation, and there is no Nepal RoHS certificate to obtain. The honest caveat: (1) absence of a regime is not a licence to disregard chemical safety — general environmental/hazardous-substance and import controls still apply, and (2) buyers and public tenders in Nepal may contractually require RoHS-style substance compliance or test reports even though no national law mandates it, so the exporter should check tender clauses. Do not over-state a Nepal RoHS obligation that does not exist.
gap.zh: 在物质限制上尼泊尔是要求较低的一方：中国有界定明确的 RoHS 框架（GB/T 26572 限制 6 项物质加中国 RoHS 2 披露标识），而尼泊尔无作为市场准入门槛的横向 RoHS 制度。因此按中国 RoHS 制造的产品通常已达到或高于尼泊尔任何基线物质预期，且无需取得尼泊尔 RoHS 证书。诚实的提示：（1）缺乏制度并非可无视化学安全的许可——一般环境/危险物质和进口管制仍适用；（2）尼泊尔的买家和公共招标可能在合同中要求 RoHS 式物质合规或检测报告，即便无国家法律强制，故出口商应核查招标条款。不要夸大一项并不存在的尼泊尔 RoHS 义务。
gap.zht: 在物質限制上尼泊爾是要求較低的一方：中國有界定明確的 RoHS 框架（GB/T 26572 限制 6 項物質加中國 RoHS 2 披露標識），而尼泊爾無作為市場准入門檻的橫向 RoHS 制度。因此按中國 RoHS 製造的產品通常已達到或高於尼泊爾任何基線物質預期，且無需取得尼泊爾 RoHS 證書。誠實的提示：（1）缺乏制度並非可無視化學安全的許可——一般環境/危險物質和進口管制仍適用；（2）尼泊爾的買家和公共招標可能在合同中要求 RoHS 式物質合規或檢測報告，即便無國家法律強制，故出口商應核查招標條款。不要誇大一項並不存在的尼泊爾 RoHS 義務。

mandatory_status.target: No equivalent — no EU-style horizontal RoHS substance-restriction regime in Nepal as of 2026; substance conditions arise only via general controls or buyer / tender requirements
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (restriction + disclosure) — GB/T 26572 restricts 6 substances and China RoHS 2 (SJ/T 11364) requires the hazardous-substance disclosure label for EEE in China

source.publisher: Nepal Bureau of Standards and Metrology (NBSM)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Nepal has no EU-style horizontal RoHS regime as of 2026 — there is no national mandatory 10-substance restriction or RoHS certificate that an LED luminaire must hold to enter the market on substance grounds. A product built to China RoHS (GB/T 26572) generally already exceeds any baseline Nepal expectation. The honest caveats: general environmental and import controls still apply, and Nepal buyers / public tenders may contractually require RoHS-style substance compliance or test reports. Do not over-state a Nepal RoHS obligation; confirm any substance conditions with the in-country importer and tender documents.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至 2026 年尼泊尔无欧盟式横向 RoHS 制度——不存在 LED 灯具须基于物质理由持有才能进入市场的国家强制 10 项物质限制或 RoHS 证书。按中国 RoHS（GB/T 26572）制造的产品通常已超出尼泊尔任何基线预期。诚实提示：一般环境和进口管制仍适用，尼泊尔买家/公共招标可能在合同中要求 RoHS 式物质合规或检测报告。不要夸大尼泊尔 RoHS 义务；请与在地进口商及招标文件确认任何物质条件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至 2026 年尼泊爾無歐盟式橫向 RoHS 制度——不存在 LED 燈具須基於物質理由持有才能進入市場的國家強制 10 項物質限制或 RoHS 證書。按中國 RoHS（GB/T 26572）製造的產品通常已超出尼泊爾任何基線預期。誠實提示：一般環境和進口管制仍適用，尼泊爾買家/公共招標可能在合同中要求 RoHS 式物質合規或檢測報告。不要誇大尼泊爾 RoHS 義務；請與在地進口商及招標文件確認任何物質條件。

requirement_topic.en: Chemical / SVHC supply-chain notification — no REACH-style obligation in Nepal
requirement_topic.zh: 化学品/SVHC 供应链通报——尼泊尔无 REACH 式义务
requirement_topic.zht: 化學品/SVHC 供應鏈通報——尼泊爾無 REACH 式義務

summary.en: Nepal has no equivalent to the EU REACH Regulation (EC) 1907/2006 and its Article 33 SVHC supply-chain notification duty. There is no Nepal Candidate List of Substances of Very High Concern, no biannual-update obligation, no 45-day customer-notification duty, and no SCIP-style database registration for articles. Chemical management in Nepal operates through general environmental protection law, hazardous-chemical handling rules, and import controls rather than an article-level SVHC communication regime. The plain statement: for LED luminaires there is no ongoing SVHC tracking-and-notification compliance obligation imposed by Nepal national law. Any SVHC-style requirement would arise only contractually — for example a multinational buyer or donor-funded tender importing into Nepal applying its own group chemical policy.
summary.zh: 尼泊尔不存在等同于欧盟 REACH 法规（EC）1907/2006 及其第 33 条 SVHC 供应链通报义务的制度。尼泊尔没有高度关注物质候选清单、没有每半年更新义务、没有 45 天客户通报义务，也没有针对物品的 SCIP 式数据库注册。尼泊尔的化学品管理通过一般环境保护法、危险化学品处理规则和进口管制运作，而非物品级 SVHC 通报制度。明确表述：对于 LED 灯具，尼泊尔国家法律未施加持续的 SVHC 跟踪与通报合规义务。任何 SVHC 式要求仅可能在合同中产生——例如向尼泊尔进口的跨国买家或捐助方资助招标适用其自身集团化学品政策。
summary.zht: 尼泊爾不存在等同於歐盟 REACH 法規（EC）1907/2006 及其第 33 條 SVHC 供應鏈通報義務的制度。尼泊爾沒有高度關注物質候選清單、沒有每半年更新義務、沒有 45 天客戶通報義務，也沒有針對物品的 SCIP 式數據庫注冊。尼泊爾的化學品管理通過一般環境保護法、危險化學品處理規則和進口管制運作，而非物品級 SVHC 通報制度。明確表述：對於 LED 燈具，尼泊爾國家法律未施加持續的 SVHC 跟蹤與通報合規義務。任何 SVHC 式要求僅可能在合同中產生——例如向尼泊爾進口的跨國買家或捐助方資助招標適用其自身集團化學品政策。

standards_or_laws: No REACH / SVHC Article 33-equivalent supply-chain notification regime in Nepal as of 2026
General Nepal environmental protection and hazardous-chemical / import controls (not an article-level SVHC communication duty)

summary.en: China likewise does not have a one-to-one equivalent of the REACH Article 33 article-level SVHC supply-chain notification duty. China's nearest instruments are MEE Order No. 12 (Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances) on new chemical substance registration and GB 30981 / GHS-aligned classification and labelling rules for hazardous chemicals. These regulate chemical substances and mixtures rather than imposing an EU-style obligation to proactively notify B2B customers when an SVHC above 0.1% w/w is present in an article.
summary.zh: 中国同样没有一对一等同于 REACH 第 33 条物品级 SVHC 供应链通报义务的制度。中国最接近的工具是生态环境部令第 12 号（新化学物质环境管理登记办法）关于新化学物质登记，以及 GB 30981 / 与 GHS 一致的危险化学品分类和标签规则。这些监管化学物质和混合物，而非施加欧盟式的、在物品中 SVHC 超过 0.1%（质量分数）时主动通报 B2B 客户的义务。
summary.zht: 中國同樣沒有一對一等同於 REACH 第 33 條物品級 SVHC 供應鏈通報義務的制度。中國最接近的工具是生態環境部令第 12 號（新化學物質環境管理登記辦法）關於新化學物質登記，以及 GB 30981 / 與 GHS 一致的危險化學品分類和標籤規則。這些監管化學物質和混合物，而非施加歐盟式的、在物品中 SVHC 超過 0.1%（質量分數）時主動通報 B2B 客戶的義務。

standards_or_laws: MEE Order No. 12 — Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances (China)
GB 30981 — classification and labelling rules for hazardous chemicals (China, GHS-aligned)

gap.en: On article-level SVHC supply-chain notification, neither Nepal nor China imposes a REACH Article 33-equivalent duty — so there is no China-to-Nepal gap of the kind seen in a China-to-EU comparison, where REACH adds a major obligation. For the Nepal market specifically, the exporter does not need to build an ECHA-Candidate-List screening process or a 45-day notification workflow as a legal market-access condition. The realistic residual risk is contractual: a multinational distributor, retail chain, or donor-funded project importing into Nepal may apply its own corporate REACH-style chemical policy and request SVHC declarations. The exporter should therefore treat SVHC documentation as a buyer-driven, not Nepal-law-driven, item — and not represent it as a Nepal regulatory requirement.
gap.zh: 在物品级 SVHC 供应链通报上，尼泊尔和中国都未施加等同于 REACH 第 33 条的义务——故不存在中欧对比中那种 REACH 增加重大义务的中尼差距。具体到尼泊尔市场，出口商无需建立 ECHA 候选清单筛查流程或 45 天通报工作流作为法律市场准入条件。现实的剩余风险是合同性的：向尼泊尔进口的跨国经销商、零售连锁或捐助方资助项目可能适用其自身公司 REACH 式化学品政策并要求 SVHC 声明。因此出口商应将 SVHC 文件视为买家驱动而非尼泊尔法律驱动的事项——且不将其表述为尼泊尔法规要求。
gap.zht: 在物品級 SVHC 供應鏈通報上，尼泊爾和中國都未施加等同於 REACH 第 33 條的義務——故不存在中歐對比中那種 REACH 增加重大義務的中尼差距。具體到尼泊爾市場，出口商無需建立 ECHA 候選清單篩查流程或 45 天通報工作流作為法律市場准入條件。現實的剩餘風險是合同性的：向尼泊爾進口的跨國經銷商、零售連鎖或捐助方資助項目可能適用其自身公司 REACH 式化學品政策並要求 SVHC 聲明。因此出口商應將 SVHC 文件視為買家驅動而非尼泊爾法律驅動的事項——且不將其表述為尼泊爾法規要求。

mandatory_status.target: No equivalent — no REACH / SVHC Article 33-style article-level supply-chain notification duty in Nepal; any SVHC declaration is buyer / contract driven, not a Nepal legal market-access condition
mandatory_status.cn: No direct equivalent — China has no REACH Article 33-style article-level SVHC notification duty; chemical management via MEE Order No. 12 and GB 30981 instead

source.publisher: Nepal Bureau of Standards and Metrology (NBSM)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Nepal has no REACH / SVHC Article 33-style article-level supply-chain notification duty, and neither does China — so there is no China-to-Nepal SVHC gap acting as a market-access condition. The exporter does not need an ECHA-Candidate-List screening or 45-day notification workflow for the Nepal market as a matter of law. The only realistic SVHC trigger is contractual — a multinational buyer or donor-funded tender applying its own chemical policy. Treat SVHC documentation as buyer-driven, not a Nepal regulatory requirement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 尼泊尔没有 REACH / SVHC 第 33 条式物品级供应链通报义务，中国也没有——故不存在作为市场准入条件的中尼 SVHC 差距。就法律而言，出口商在尼泊尔市场无需 ECHA 候选清单筛查或 45 天通报工作流。唯一现实的 SVHC 触发因素是合同性的——跨国买家或捐助方资助招标适用其自身化学品政策。请将 SVHC 文件视为买家驱动，而非尼泊尔法规要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 尼泊爾沒有 REACH / SVHC 第 33 條式物品級供應鏈通報義務，中國也沒有——故不存在作為市場准入條件的中尼 SVHC 差距。就法律而言，出口商在尼泊爾市場無需 ECHA 候選清單篩查或 45 天通報工作流。唯一現實的 SVHC 觸發因素是合同性的——跨國買家或捐助方資助招標適用其自身化學品政策。請將 SVHC 文件視為買家驅動，而非尼泊爾法規要求。

requirement_topic.en: Import, customs and NBSM conformity pathway — landlocked transit via India vs China CCC
requirement_topic.zh: 进口、海关与 NBSM 合格评定路径——经印度内陆转运 vs 中国 CCC
requirement_topic.zht: 進口、海關與 NBSM 合格評定路徑——經印度內陸轉運 vs 中國 CCC

summary.en: Placing LED luminaires on the Nepali market runs through a licensed in-country importer of record and Nepal customs, plus NBSM (Nepal Bureau of Standards and Metrology) conformity where the product is in mandatory NS certification scope. Nepal is landlocked, so sea freight from China is discharged at an Indian port — typically Kolkata / Haldia or Visakhapatnam (Vizag) — and moves overland into Nepal under transit arrangements, which adds documentation （India transit, Nepal customs declaration） and lead-time considerations. The importer handles customs clearance, any NBSM conformity / NS marking steps for regulated products, and — for wireless smart luminaires — NTA radio approval. The exporter's job is to supply a compliant product plus the technical evidence （safety, EMC, photobiological test reports referenced to NS/IEC standards） the importer needs to clear and, where required, certify the goods.
summary.zh: 将 LED 灯具投放尼泊尔市场须通过持牌在地进口商和尼泊尔海关，并在产品处于强制 NS 认证范围时通过 NBSM（尼泊尔标准与计量局）合格评定。尼泊尔为内陆国，故来自中国的海运在印度港口卸货——通常为加尔各答/哈尔迪亚或维沙卡帕特南（维萨）——并在转运安排下陆运进入尼泊尔，这增加了文件（印度转运、尼泊尔海关申报）和交付周期考量。进口商负责海关清关、受监管产品的任何 NBSM 合格评定/NS 标识步骤，以及——对于无线智能灯具——NTA 无线电核准。出口商的任务是提供合规产品以及进口商清关并（在需要时）认证货物所需的技术证据（对照 NS/IEC 标准的安全、EMC、光生物检测报告）。
summary.zht: 將 LED 燈具投放尼泊爾市場須通過持牌在地進口商和尼泊爾海關，並在產品處於強制 NS 認證範圍時通過 NBSM（尼泊爾標準與計量局）合格評定。尼泊爾為內陸國，故來自中國的海運在印度港口卸貨——通常為加爾各答/哈爾迪亞或維沙卡帕特南（維薩）——並在轉運安排下陸運進入尼泊爾，這增加了文件（印度轉運、尼泊爾海關申報）和交付週期考量。進口商負責海關清關、受監管產品的任何 NBSM 合格評定/NS 標識步驟，以及——對於無線智能燈具——NTA 無線電核准。出口商的任務是提供合規產品以及進口商清關並（在需要時）認證貨物所需的技術證據（對照 NS/IEC 標準的安全、EMC、光生物檢測報告）。

standards_or_laws: NBSM conformity / NS certification pathway for regulated products, handled with the in-country importer of record
Nepal customs and India transit arrangements (landlocked — discharge via Kolkata / Haldia or Visakhapatnam, overland into Nepal)

summary.en: For the China domestic market, an LED luminaire in scope is certified under CCC (China Compulsory Certification) administered by CNCA, with certification typically through a body such as CQC, and sold directly within China without cross-border transit or an importer-of-record step. Wireless smart luminaires additionally hold SRRC radio approval. The CCC pathway is a single-jurisdiction domestic process with no landlocked-transit logistics dimension.
summary.zh: 对于中国国内市场，范围内的 LED 灯具依由 CNCA 管理的 CCC（中国强制性产品认证）认证，通常通过 CQC 等机构认证，并在中国境内直接销售，无跨境转运或进口商环节。无线智能灯具另持 SRRC 无线电核准。CCC 路径是单一辖区的国内流程，无内陆转运物流维度。
summary.zht: 對於中國國內市場，範圍內的 LED 燈具依由 CNCA 管理的 CCC（中國強制性產品認證）認證，通常通過 CQC 等機構認證，並在中國境內直接銷售，無跨境轉運或進口商環節。無線智能燈具另持 SRRC 無線電核准。CCC 路徑是單一轄區的國內流程，無內陸轉運物流維度。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) administered by CNCA, certified via bodies such as CQC — domestic LED luminaire pathway
SRRC radio approval for wireless smart luminaires (China domestic)

gap.en: The Nepal pathway differs structurally from China's CCC: (1) it is cross-border and runs through a licensed in-country importer of record, who is central to customs clearance and any NBSM conformity step — the exporter cannot self-place the product as a manufacturer the way it operates domestically in China; (2) Nepal's landlocked geography means goods transit an Indian port (Kolkata / Haldia or Vizag) overland into Nepal, adding India-transit and Nepal-customs documentation and lead time absent from a China domestic sale; (3) the conformity evidence must be referenced to NS/IEC standards acceptable to NBSM, not the Chinese CCC certificate, which is not recognised in Nepal; and (4) wireless products need NTA approval separately. The exporter's deliverable is a product plus NS/IEC-referenced test evidence handed to the importer — substance-restriction (RoHS/REACH) is notably NOT a Nepal market-access gate here, unlike in an EU pathway.
gap.zh: 尼泊尔路径在结构上不同于中国 CCC：（1）它是跨境的，并通过持牌在地进口商运作，后者在海关清关和任何 NBSM 合格评定环节中处于核心——出口商不能像在中国国内那样以制造商身份自行投放产品；（2）尼泊尔的内陆地理意味着货物经印度港口（加尔各答/哈尔迪亚或维萨）陆运进入尼泊尔，增加了中国国内销售所没有的印度转运和尼泊尔海关文件及交付周期；（3）合格评定证据须对照 NBSM 可接受的 NS/IEC 标准，而非在尼泊尔不被认可的中国 CCC 证书；（4）无线产品另需 NTA 核准。出口商的交付物是产品加交给进口商的 NS/IEC 对照检测证据——值得注意的是，物质限制（RoHS/REACH）在此并非尼泊尔市场准入门槛，不同于欧盟路径。
gap.zht: 尼泊爾路徑在結構上不同於中國 CCC：（1）它是跨境的，並通過持牌在地進口商運作，後者在海關清關和任何 NBSM 合格評定環節中處於核心——出口商不能像在中國國內那樣以製造商身份自行投放產品；（2）尼泊爾的內陸地理意味著貨物經印度港口（加爾各答/哈爾迪亞或維薩）陸運進入尼泊爾，增加了中國國內銷售所沒有的印度轉運和尼泊爾海關文件及交付週期；（3）合格評定證據須對照 NBSM 可接受的 NS/IEC 標準，而非在尼泊爾不被認可的中國 CCC 證書；（4）無線產品另需 NTA 核准。出口商的交付物是產品加交給進口商的 NS/IEC 對照檢測證據——值得注意的是，物質限制（RoHS/REACH）在此並非尼泊爾市場准入門檻，不同於歐盟路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (process) — placement runs through a licensed in-country importer of record, Nepal customs, and NBSM conformity / NS certification where the product is in scope; goods transit via an Indian port (landlocked)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (domestic) — CCC certification via CNCA / CQC for in-scope luminaires sold in China; single-jurisdiction with no importer-of-record or transit step

source.publisher: Nepal Bureau of Standards and Metrology (NBSM)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The Nepal pathway is cross-border and importer-led: placement runs through a licensed in-country importer of record, Nepal customs, and NBSM conformity / NS certification where in scope, with goods transiting an Indian port (Kolkata / Haldia or Vizag) overland into landlocked Nepal. The Chinese CCC certificate is not recognised — conformity evidence must be referenced to NS/IEC standards acceptable to NBSM, and wireless products need NTA approval. Notably, substance restriction (RoHS/REACH) is NOT a Nepal market-access gate here, unlike an EU pathway. Coordinate the conformity and customs steps with the in-country importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 尼泊尔路径是跨境且由进口商主导的：投放须通过持牌在地进口商、尼泊尔海关，并在范围内通过 NBSM 合格评定/NS 认证，货物经印度港口（加尔各答/哈尔迪亚或维萨）陆运进入内陆国尼泊尔。中国 CCC 证书不被认可——合格评定证据须对照 NBSM 可接受的 NS/IEC 标准，无线产品需 NTA 核准。值得注意的是，物质限制（RoHS/REACH）在此并非尼泊尔市场准入门槛，不同于欧盟路径。请与在地进口商协调合格评定与海关步骤。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 尼泊爾路徑是跨境且由進口商主導的：投放須通過持牌在地進口商、尼泊爾海關，並在範圍內通過 NBSM 合格評定/NS 認證，貨物經印度港口（加爾各答/哈爾迪亞或維薩）陸運進入內陸國尼泊爾。中國 CCC 證書不被認可——合格評定證據須對照 NBSM 可接受的 NS/IEC 標準，無線產品需 NTA 核准。值得注意的是，物質限制（RoHS/REACH）在此並非尼泊爾市場准入門檻，不同於歐盟路徑。請與在地進口商協調合格評定與海關步驟。
